articles.title: Return and Refund Policy
articles.content:
At Acme Retail, 'return' and 'refund' are the same thing — we want to make it right for you. The process depends on your order's delivery status.

For orders NOT yet delivered (status: placed or processing):
We cancel the order and issue a full refund. Refunds up to ₹25,000 are processed automatically within 5 business days to your original payment method. Refund requests above ₹25,000 are escalated to a specialist who contacts you within 24 hours.

For DELIVERED orders:
We initiate a return pickup at your delivery address at no cost to you. Once the pickup is confirmed, your refund is processed within 2 business days. Return requests for items above ₹25,000 in value must be reviewed by a specialist — a priority case is created and you'll hear from a specialist within 24 hours.

articles.title: Return Eligibility and Time Window
articles.content:
Return requests must be raised within the following windows from the date of delivery:

- Electronics: 7 days
- Apparel, home goods, and accessories: 30 days

To be eligible, items must be unused, undamaged, and in their original packaging with all accessories and tags intact. Damaged, used, or tampered items may not qualify for a full refund. Digital downloads and personalised/customised items are non-returnable.

articles.title: High-Value Returns and Escalations (Above ₹25,000)
articles.content:
Return and refund requests for orders or items valued above ₹25,000 require specialist review — this applies to both undelivered and delivered orders.

For undelivered orders above ₹25,000:
A high-priority CRM case is created. A specialist reviews and processes the cancellation and refund within 24 hours.

For delivered orders above ₹25,000:
A specialist coordinates the return pickup and processes the refund after the item is received and inspected. Expected resolution is within 2 business days of confirmed pickup.

In all escalated cases, a specialist is assigned within 2 hours and the customer receives progress updates at their registered email address.

articles.title: Order Cancellation and Address Update Policy
articles.content:
Orders in 'placed' or 'processing' status can be cancelled — either individual line items or the full order. A refund is automatically issued for cancelled items.

Once an order is shipped or delivered it cannot be cancelled. For those orders, please request a return instead — the process is the same outcome.

Address changes are allowed for orders that have not yet been dispatched (status: placed or processing). Once an order is marked as shipped, the delivery address cannot be changed.

articles.title: Refund Timelines and Supported Payment Methods
articles.content:
Refunds are issued to the original payment method by default. Customers may request a refund to a different supported method if needed.

Supported refund methods: HDFC Credit Card, ICICI Debit Card, SBI Net Banking, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm).

Refund timelines:
- Auto-processed refunds for cancelled orders (up to ₹25,000): 5 business days
- Refunds after return pickup confirmation: 2 business days
- Specialist-reviewed refunds (above ₹25,000): up to 2 business days after specialist approval

You will receive an email confirmation when the refund is initiated. Bank processing times may add 1–2 additional business days depending on your bank.

articles.title: Cash on Delivery (COD) Orders — Cancellation and Refund
articles.content:
Cash on Delivery (COD) orders follow a slightly different process for cancellations and refunds:

For COD orders NOT yet delivered (placed or processing):
The order can be cancelled at no charge. Since payment has not yet been collected, no refund is required — you simply will not be charged on delivery.

For COD orders that ARE delivered:
Since the payment was made in cash at the door, refunds cannot be sent back as cash. You must provide an electronic refund method:
- UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm)
- HDFC Credit Card
- ICICI Debit Card
- SBI Net Banking

Once a return pickup is confirmed, the refund is processed to your chosen electronic method within 5 business days.

For COD orders above ₹25,000:
High-value COD refunds require specialist review. A priority case is raised and a specialist contacts you within 24 hours to coordinate the return pickup and electronic refund.
